---
name: Clients
description: Every active Pacific Consulting client engagement, organized by tier (strategic = top revenue + dedicated account lead, growth = expansion stage, transactional = single-project relationships).
---

# Clients

Clients are tiered by strategic value, not by revenue alone. A growth-tier client with a clear path to strategic status often outranks a transactional client with higher current spend.

Each client engagement has a primary delivery team (`served-by`) and a named account lead (`account-lead`) responsible for the relationship. Active accounts captured here include [Acme Corp](/clients/acme-corp) and [Globex](/clients/globex); the directory is curated for relevance to current engagements, not a comprehensive log of past relationships.
